The above-mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid in Cash or by Debit/Credit Card.

Please Note:

- The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.

The duration of days when the application is in transit between the Visa Application Centre and the Embassy are not counted. An incomplete application that does not contain all documents according to the specified checklist will not be accepted by the Embassy.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Kindly be informed that your application must be approved by the Embassy of the Slovak Republic in Vietnam before submission. Once your application is approved by the Embassy of the Slovak Republic in Vietnam, you may book an appointment with VFS to submit it at our Centre. 
Please click here (https://www.mzv.sk/en/web/hanoj-en/visa-and-services/national-visa) for detailed information. 
More information can also be found at the website of Embassy of the Slovak Republic in Hanoi (https://www.mzv.sk/hanoj-en)
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Kindly be informed that your application must be approved by the Embassy of the Slovak Republic in Vietnam before submission. Once your application is approved by the Embassy of the Slovak Republic in Vietnam, you may book an appointment with VFS to submit it at our Centre. 
Please click here (https://www.mzv.sk/en/web/hanoj-en/visa-and-services/national-visa) for detailed information. 
More information can also be found at the website of Embassy of the Slovak Republic in Hanoi (https://www.mzv.sk/hanoj-en)

## Visa Fees

[svk > vnm > en > Table:National Visa – Language Education > Visa Fees]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid in Cash or by Debit/Credit Card.
VFS Service charge:
Applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of EUR 35 (1,079,000 VND) (Inclusive of all applicable taxes) payable in cash or by Debit/Credit Card.
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee Vietnamese Dong (VND) is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.

## Documents Required
Please refer to document checklist for your visa application here – Click here
For more information : https://www.mzv.sk/en/web/hanoj-en/visa-and-services/national-visa (https://www.mzv.sk/en/web/hanoj-en/visa-and-services/national-visa)
An application without the complete set of documents according to the above-mentioned checklist may lead to a refusal. 

## Photo Specifications
Please provide two recent colour photograph (not more than 6 months old) of yourself, meeting the following requirements:
- Taken against a light (white or off-white) background so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background.
- Clear quality and with the face in focus
- Full face: non-smiling, no sunglasses, no hat/cap or any head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of his/her religious belief or ethnic background
- Printed on normal photographic paper (camera print)
- Please stick the photograph on the Visa Application Form
If the photographs presented do not meet these requirements (click here), then the visa application will be considered incomplete.

## Processing Time
From the date of receipt of application at the Embassy of Slovakia, it takes 30 working days to process the visa application. The duration of days when the application is in transit between the Visa Application Centre and the Embassy are not counted. An incomplete application that does not contain all documents according to the specified checklist will not be accepted by the Embassy. 

## Download Forms
Application for Visa
To Download a Form: 
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Kindly be informed that your application must be approved by the Embassy of the Slovak Republic in Vietnam before submission. Once your application is approved by the Embassy of the Slovak Republic in Vietnam, you may book an appointment with VFS to submit it at our Centre. 
Please click here (https://www.mzv.sk/en/web/hanoj-en/visa-and-services/national-visa) for detailed information. 
More information can also be found at the website of Embassy of the Slovak Republic in Hanoi (https://www.mzv.sk/hanoj-en)

## Visa Fees

[svk > vnm > en > Table:National Visa – Residence permit > Visa Fees]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid in Cash or by Debit/Credit Card.
VFS Service charge:
Applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of EUR 35 (1,079,000 VND) (Inclusive of all applicable taxes) payable in cash or by Debit/Credit Card.
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee Vietnamese Dong (VND) is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.

## Documents Required
Please refer to document checklist for your visa application here – Click here
For more information : https://www.mzv.sk/en/web/hanoj-en/visa-and-services/national-visa (https://www.mzv.sk/en/web/hanoj-en/visa-and-services/national-visa)
An application without the complete set of documents according to the above-mentioned checklist may lead to a refusal. 

## Photo Specifications
Please provide two recent colour photograph (not more than 6 months old) of yourself, meeting the following requirements:
- Taken against a light (white or off-white) background so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background.
- Clear quality and with the face in focus
- Full face: non-smiling, no sunglasses, no hat/cap or any head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of his/her religious belief or ethnic background
- Printed on normal photographic paper (camera print)
- Please stick the photograph on the Visa Application Form
If the photographs presented do not meet these requirements (click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/one-pager/slovakia/india/english/pdf/PhotoSpecifications.pdf)), then the visa application will be considered incomplete.

## Processing Time
From the date of receipt of application at the Embassy of Slovakia, it takes 15 working days to process the visa application. The duration of days when the application is in transit between the Visa Application Centre and the Embassy are not counted. An incomplete application that does not contain all documents according to the specified checklist will not be accepted by the Embassy.

## Download Forms
Application for Visa
To Download a Form: 
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

visa_types.name: Business
visa_types.documents_required:
Please refer to document checklist for your visa application here - Click here
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries.
An application without the complete set of documents according to the above-mentioned checklist may lead to an extended processing time of the application and/or a refusal.
visa_types.visa_fees:
[svk > vnm > en > Table:Business > Visa Fees]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid in Cash or by Debit/Credit Card.
VFS Service charge:
Applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of EUR 35 (1,079,000 VND) (Inclusive of all applicable taxes) payable in cash or by Debit/Credit Card.
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee in Vietnamese Dong (VND) is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.
- Applicants exempted from visa fee need to pay only VFS Global Service fee.
- No administrative fee is charged for Schengen visa application filed by a third country national who is a family member of an EU or EEA national and exercise their right of free movement. The applicant should provide the proof of relation (like: marriage certificate, birth certificate, etc…) and the passport copy of the EU citizen.
- In the case of visa applications submitted by official delegations or by persons holding an official passport, the visa fee shall be charged upon agreement with the Embassy.
visa_types.processing_time:
From the date of receipt of application at the Embassy of Slovakia, it takes 15 working days to process the visa application. The duration of days when the application is in transit between the Visa Application Centre and the Embassy are not counted.
Passport and any requested original documents will be held by the embassy during visa application process. In justified cases, the procedure period can be extended to 45 days. The Embassy of the Slovak Republic in Hanoi reserves the right to request to submit additional supporting documents if required and reserves the right to conduct an interview.

- Save the form on your computer.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Business visa application is applicable in case you are travelling for business purposes. This visa is given for travel period of less than 90 days.
Please click here (https://www.mzv.sk/en/web/hanoj-en/visa-and-services/schengen-visa) for detailed information. 
More information can also be found at the website of Embassy of the Slovak Republic in Hanoi (https://www.mzv.sk/hanoj-en)
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Business visa application is applicable in case you are travelling for business purposes. This visa is given for travel period of less than 90 days.
Please click here (https://www.mzv.sk/en/web/hanoj-en/visa-and-services/schengen-visa) for detailed information. 
More information can also be found at the website of Embassy of the Slovak Republic in Hanoi (https://www.mzv.sk/hanoj-en)

## Visa Fees

[svk > vnm > en > Table:Business > Visa Fees]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid in Cash or by Debit/Credit Card.
VFS Service charge:
Applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of EUR 35 (1,079,000 VND) (Inclusive of all applicable taxes) payable in cash or by Debit/Credit Card.
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee in Vietnamese Dong (VND) is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.
- Applicants exempted from visa fee need to pay only VFS Global Service fee.
- No administrative fee is charged for Schengen visa application filed by a third country national who is a family member of an EU or EEA national and exercise their right of free movement. The applicant should provide the proof of relation (like: marriage certificate, birth certificate, etc…) and the passport copy of the EU citizen.
- In the case of visa applications submitted by official delegations or by persons holding an official passport, the visa fee shall be charged upon agreement with the Embassy.

## Documents Required
Please refer to document checklist for your visa application here - Click here
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries.
An application without the complete set of documents according to the above-mentioned checklist may lead to an extended processing time of the application and/or a refusal. 

## Photo Specifications
Please provide two recent colour photograph (not more than 6 months old) of yourself, meeting the following requirements:
- Taken against a light (white or off-white) background so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background.
- Clear quality and with the face in focus
- Full face: non-smiling, no sunglasses, no hat/cap or any head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of his/her religious belief or ethnic background
- Printed on normal photographic paper (camera print)
- Please stick the photograph on the Visa Application Form
If the photographs presented do not meet these requirements (click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/one-pager/slovakia/india/english/pdf/PhotoSpecifications.pdf)), then the visa application will be considered incomplete.

## Processing Time
From the date of receipt of application at the Embassy of Slovakia, it takes 15 working days to process the visa application. The duration of days when the application is in transit between the Visa Application Centre and the Embassy are not counted.
Passport and any requested original documents will be held by the embassy during visa application process. In justified cases, the procedure period can be extended to 45 days. The Embassy of the Slovak Republic in Hanoi reserves the right to request to submit additional supporting documents if required and reserves the right to conduct an interview.

## Download Forms
Application for Visa
Application for visa in Slovak language 
To Download a Form: 
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

visa_types.name: National visa
visa_types.overview:
- Visa for family reunification (#visaforfamilyreunification)
- Visa for residence permit for the purpose of employment (#visaforresidencepermitforthepurposeofemployment)
- Visa with granted residence permit (#visawithgrantedresidencepermit)
visa_types.full_text:
- Visa for family reunification (#visaforfamilyreunification)
- Visa for residence permit for the purpose of employment (#visaforresidencepermitforthepurposeofemployment)
- Visa with granted residence permit (#visawithgrantedresidencepermit)
